description.base: professional product presenter, 28-35 year old East Asian female or male, realistic skin texture with visible pores, natural healthy skin tone
description.hair: neatly styled hair appropriate for commercial setting, natural texture, professional appearance
description.eyes: proportionally sized eyes with natural moisture, confident professional gaze, realistic iris texture
description.facialFeatures: natural professional appearance, subtle asymmetry, approachable yet authoritative expression
description.attire: modern professional attire suitable for product category, clean pressed fabric with realistic folds, no logos or distracting patterns unless product-branded
description.expression: confident professional smile, natural human warmth, trustworthy and knowledgeable, no exaggerated sales enthusiasm
description.movement: natural professional gestures when demonstrating product, realistic physics, smooth but not artificially polished movements
